sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77691" key="pa/ntrhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάν-τρητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n77691.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all-pierced</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐλοῦ πάντρητον</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the part</tr_> of the flute <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in which the holes are</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.853e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
